name: Instant Dive-Clops
appearances: Skylanders: SuperChargers (iOS) (in the game files of the console versions)
description: Instant Dive-Clops was a digital counterpart of Dive-Clops in Skylanders: SuperChargers. He is only playable in the iOS version of the game.
biography: Instant Dive-Clops was a digital counterpart of Dive-Clops in Skylanders: SuperChargers. He is only playable in the iOS version of the game. He is the twin brother of the Giant, Eye-Brawl.
personality: As a digital counterpart of Dive-Clops, Instant Dive-Clops shares his brother's dedication to protecting Skylands from beneath the waves, characterized by his focused and observant nature.

story.content: Instant Dive-Clops was a digital counterpart of Dive-Clops in Skylanders: SuperChargers. He is only playable in the iOS version of the game. He is notably the twin brother of Eye-Brawl.

trivia: He is the only SuperCharger and Instant Skylander whose original counterpart isn't from the Starter Pack.
He is also the only Instant Skylander who does not have a Dark variant.
He is the twin brother of Eye-Brawl.
gameplay: Instant Dive-Clops utilizes water-based weaponry and sonar technology. His primary attacks include launching Waterpedoes and utilizing Sonar to find his mark. He can also create geysers and slow his enemies with specialized torpedoes.

basic.name: Waterpedo
basic.content: Instant Dive-Clops fires a high-pressure Waterpedo at his enemies.

basic.name: Sonar
basic.content: Instant Dive-Clops uses Sonar to track and target enemies underwater.

basic_upgrades.name: Put the Eye in Geyser
basic_upgrades.content: Enhanced geyser-based attack for more battlefield control.

basic_upgrades.name: Torpeslow
basic_upgrades.content: Slows down enemies hit by torpedoes.

soulgems.name: Sonar Smarts
soulgems.content: Advanced sonar capabilities for maximum strategic advantage.
